must_haves: Output is syntactically valid for the target platform — validated by a schema check, not by inspection
DRAFT card output is always marked with a prominent warning — no silent promotion of unreviewed fields
Generator reads from PatternRegistry at call time — no cached card data
Platform adapters are isolated modules — adding Datadog does not touch Prometheus adapter
FILL_IN markers are syntactically valid in the output format (YAML comments for Prometheus)
must_nots: Must not generate a threshold value from threshold_estimated prose without a FILL_IN marker — prose thresholds are estimates, not exact metric values
Must not silently skip a card field — if a required output field has no source in the card, emit FILL_IN
Must not require internet access at generation time
Must not modify pattern card files as a side effect of generation
open_questions: Should the generator be callable from gov_pipeline.py as a post-certification step, or standalone only? Deferred to CDR.
